name: ShCh-201
events: 7 Jul 1943 Shch-201 fires 6 torpedoes against a convoy made up of the Romanian merchant Ardeal (5695 BRT), the Bulgarian merchant Varna (2141 BRT), the Romanian destroyers Maresti, Marasesti and the Romanian minesweepers Locotenant-Commandor Stihi Eugen and Sublocotenant Ghiculescu some 30 nautical miles west of Yevpatoriya, Crimea in position 45°05'N, 32°43'E. All six torpedoes missed their target. Marasesti claims to have sunk the attacking submarine but this is incorrect.

19 Oct 1943 ShCh-201 attacks a convoy about 40 nautical miles west of Yevpatoriya, Crimea in position 45°04'N, 32°28'E and fires four torpedoes against the Romanian merchant Ardeal (5695 BRT) and the Hungarian merchant Kassa (1022 BRT). All four torpedoes missed their target.

4 Dec 1943 ShCh-201 fires four torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a barge about 40 nautical miles west-south-west of Ak Mechet, Crimea in position 45°18'N, 31°48'E. All four torpedoes missed their target.

6 May 1944 ShCh-201 fires four torpedoes against a German convoy about 70 nautical miles west-south-west of Cape Tarkhankut, Crimea in position 44°27'N, 31°45'E. The German transport KT-26 was missed.

11 May 1944 ShCh-201 fires two torpedoes against the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 105 in the Black Sea about 100 nautical miles east of Constanta, Romania in position 44°14'N, 30°58'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.

12 May 1944 At 0859 hours ShCh-201 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 4500 tons in the Black Sea about 105 nautical miles east of Constanta, Romania in position 44°12'N, 31°05'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.

At 2115 hours ShCh-201 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a barge in the Black Sea about 100 nautical miles east of Constanta, Romania in position 44°13'N, 31°00'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
